decisionConsistency.justification: Pattern: event-driven. 6/9 sessions consistent. Session 2 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 6 did not follow event-driven pattern. Session 8 did not follow event-driven pattern.

assumptionHandling.justification: Session 8 explicitly flagged the email-only assumption. Session 9 restructured preferences model for multi-channel. Session 9 implemented preference-based channel routing.

cumulativeRework.justification: 56/3059 lines reworked (1.8%, 29/50). 0/28 files churned (30/30). Late-session rework: 1.9% (11/20).

contextRecovery.justification: Avg context recovery: 65. Session 11: 58 (process:40 efficiency:13 ttfw:5). Session 12: 48 (process:40 efficiency:8 ttfw:0).

finalQuality.justification: Compiles. Tests: 244/244 pass (100%). 5/5 components verified in code. Only one adapter implements an interface. 7/7 components have test files. API consistency: 15/15 (naming=consistent, types=exported, methods=consistent).
